## Verification checklist

- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes

- [ ] `pnpm build` succeeds
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes

- [ ] Lighthouse a11y >= 90 on UI changes, if applicable
- [ ] VersionFooter on new UI pages, if applicable
- [ ] [lib/version.ts](../lib/version.ts) bumped to current spike number
- [ ] [docs/CURRENT_STATE.md](../docs/CURRENT_STATE.md) updated
- [ ] No files in the MUST NOT touch list modified
